data.description: Reports from Ukraine: 'Approximately at 14:00, the Russians attacked a civilian car in the center of Kherson with a drone. As a result of the hostile attack, a 41-year-old man suffered extremely serious injuries. Despite the efforts of medics to save the victim's life, he died in the hospital.'

data.title: Disrupting Youth Sports: Why Better Athletes Start With Better Parent Support
data.description: The youth sports industry has evolved into a significant arena, yet many parents are left to navigate it on their own. Alex Hocevar, co-founder of Supporter, believes that parents are expected to handle various aspects of the industry, such as mindset, equipment, nutrition, and safe sport protocols, without much guidance. This suggests that despite the high-stakes nature of the industry, parents are often left to rely on their instincts.

data.title: Straiker Appoints Sriram Puthucode as Chief Revenue Officer as Company Accelerates Global Expansion
data.description: Experienced cybersecurity executive, Sriram "Sri" Puthucode, has joined Straiker to lead the global go-to-market strategy after the company secured a significant $64 million in Series A funding. Based in Mountain View, California, Straiker, known as The Agentic Security Company, revealed this latest move on July 2, 2026.

data.title: GPGI INVESTIGATION ALERT: Investigation Launched into GPGI, Inc., Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP Encourage Investors and Potential Witnesses to Contact Firm
data.description: A legal firm, Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP, is currently looking into potential breaches of U.S. federal securities laws related to GPGI, Inc. (NYSE: GPGI). They are seeking information from individuals who may aid in the investigation. GPGI investors are especially encouraged to come forward if they have valuable information. The investigation focuses on possible violations concerning GPGI, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol GPGI.
SAUDI ARABIA'S CRUDE OIL EXPORTS NEAR PRE-WAR AMOUNTS.
SAUDI ARABIA EXPORTED 6.3 MILLION BARRELS PER DAY IN THE FIRST SIX DAYS THROUGH WEDNESDAY.

data.title: NKGen Biotech to Present at the 2026 BIOCHINA Global Forum on Troculeucel’s Potential in Alzheimer’s Disease and Other Neurodegenerative Conditions
data.description: On July 2, 2026, NKGen Biotech, Inc. (OTC: NKGN) revealed that their Chairman and CEO, Dr. Paul Y. Song, will be discussing the company's primary investigational program, troculeucel, at the 2026 BIOCHINA Global Forum in Seoul, South Korea on July 9-10, 2026. NKGen is a clinical-stage biotech firm concentrating on advancing autologous and allogeneic natural killer (“NK”) cell therapeutics. This showcase signifies a significant step for the company in presenting their innovative therapeutic approaches, with a global audience expected at the forum.

data.title: New Partnerships Transforming Southern Ohio Jobs Center
data.description: In Chillicothe, Ohio, U.S. Paper Mill is spearheading a remarkable industrial revitalization by converting the erstwhile Pixelle Specialty Solutions facility into a cutting-edge hub for various industries. This transformation will see the site serve as a central hub for advanced manufacturing, aerospace innovation, medical device production, research, development, and next-gen computing technologies in Southern Ohio. The initiative involves collaborations with Amphibian Aerospace Industries, Inc. (AAI), U.S. Medical Glove Company, Align, and other partners.

data.title: o9 Solutions Promotes Dr. Ashwin Rao to Chief Technology Officer
data.description: In Dallas, o9 Solutions, a prominent software company specializing in enterprise planning and decision-making solutions across over 30 industry sectors through its innovative Digital Brain platform, has promoted Dr. Ashwin Rao to Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Dr. Rao, a versatile leader with a background spanning Wall Street, various industries, and academia, will assume the role. This move underscores o9's dedication to driving pioneering innovations aimed at revolutionizing enterprise operations.

data.title: Omilia Appoints Armando Trivellato as EVP Growth Latin America and Iberia
data.description: Omilia, a company based in Athens, Greece, made an announcement today regarding the appointment of Armando Trivellato as the new Executive Vice President Growth for Latin America and Iberia.

data.title: ZenaTech to Showcase Drone as a Service Growth and ZenaDrone Defense Solutions at Series of U.S. and Global Investor and Defense Events
data.description: ZenaTech is set to highlight the expansion of its Drone as a Service division and ZenaDrone Defense Solutions at various U.S. and international investor and defense gatherings. The company aims to present its innovative offerings to a wide audience and expects significant interest. Stay tuned as ZenaTech exposes its advancements in the drone industry and defense sector at upcoming events.

data.title: Vivani Announces Entry into Merger Agreement Between Wholly Owned Subsidiary Cortigent, Inc. and Nasdaq-listed ClearOne, Inc.
data.description: Vivani has suggested a merger between Cortigent, Inc. and a ClearOne, Inc. subsidiary. The plan involves a name and ticker symbol change for the merged company to Cortigent Holdings, Inc. operating as Cortigent with the ticker symbol "CRGT." ClearOne, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CLRO.

data.title: YD Bio Expands U.S. Laboratory Footprint to 46 States, Strengthening DNA-Methylation Early Cancer Detection Operations
data.description: On July 2, 2026, YD Bio Limited, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as YDES, revealed that its affiliate, EG BioMed US Inc., has secured out-of-state clinical laboratory licenses in Rhode Island and Pennsylvania. These licenses are for their CLIA-certified, CAP-accredited laboratory located in Bothell, Washington (CLIA #50D2316600). This move strengthens YD Bio's evolution from a collection of technologies to a platform-based biotechnology firm focused on clinically derived molecular data.

data.title: Eos Energy Announces Commencement of Rights Offering
data.description: Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOSE) based in Edison, N.J., a key player in zinc-based long-duration energy storage systems, has initiated the offering of subscription rights to its common stock and warrants holders. This move, announced on July 2, 2026, includes holders of warrants issued in April 14, 2023, May 17, 2023, December 19, 2023, and November 21, 2025. Eligible holders as of July 1, 2026, the record date, are eligible for this offering. Eos Energy is known for its innovation in the design, manufacturing, and provision of these systems in the United States.

data.title: Traction Uranium Announces Completion of Airborne Radiometric Survey at the Aurora Uranium Project
data.description: New radiometric data has been gathered over key areas to assist in further exploration efforts along 17 kilometers of promising ground in the southeastern Athabasca Basin. This data aims to pinpoint potential areas of interest for future exploration activities.

data.title: Northern Technologies International Corporation to Announce Fiscal 2026 Third-Quarter Financial Results and Host Conference Call
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Northern Technologies International Corporation (NASDAQ: NTIC) stated that it plans to unveil its fiscal 2026 third-quarter financial outcomes on July 9, 2026, prior to the market's opening. Interested individuals can access a copy of the press release on the Investor Relations segment of NTIC’s website at www.ntic.com.

data.title: OnKure Therapeutics to Host Virtual KOL Event to Discuss PI3Kα Inhibitor Medicines: Selectivity Matters & Pan-Mutant Allosteric Inhibition Delivers, on July 15, 2026
data.description: On July 2, 2026, OnKure Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: OKUR), headquartered in Boulder, Colorado, a company specializing in novel precision medicines, shared plans to hold a virtual event with key opinion leaders on July 15, 2026, at 11:00 AM ET. The event will feature Benjamin F. Cravatt, PhD from The Scripps Research Institute and Robert Abraham, PhD from Engine Biosciences, alongside company executives. The discussion will focus on the importance of PI3Kα selectivity and the company's innovative approach to discovering allosteric pan-mutant PI3Kα inhibitors through structure-based drug design. To attend, interested individuals can register by clicking on the provided link.

data.title: GoldHaven Engages Northtech Drilling for Inaugural Drill Program at the Magno Project
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on July 02, 2026, GoldHaven Resources Corp. (CSE: GOH) (OTCQB: GHVNF) (FSE: 4QS) has confirmed a partnership with Northtech Drilling Ltd. to carry out the Company's fully financed first diamond drilling initiative at its Magno Project in northern British Columbia. The project is situated in the Cassiar District and is wholly owned by GoldHaven.

data.title: Flyte Announces Successful Launch of New Direct-to-Consumer Booking Platform
data.description: There was a significant increase in revenue from the first quarter to the second quarter, with a sequential growth of approximately 170%. This growth was driven by accelerating customer adoption in key travel markets.

data.title: Integer Announces Conference Call to Discuss Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Integer Holdings Corporation, a prominent medical device CDMO, based in Plano, Texas, declared that it will be hosting a webcast conference call to review its financial performance and business achievements for the second quarter concluding on July 3, 2026. This event is scheduled for Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 8 a.m. CT (9 a.m. ET). The call, broadcasted through NYSE: ITGR, may contain discussions on future prospects and substantial data.
